items.title: Europe, Africa, America & International Markets
items.description: We master African and European dynamics and support the deployment of investment projects on high-potential international markets.

items.description: DEOYA CAPITAL goes beyond producing analysis. We structure, pilot and support project implementation through to effective deployment.

items.title: Agile Firm
items.description: A streamlined and strategic structure, supported by an international network of experts mobilized according to each mission's challenges. This organization ensures responsiveness, precision and efficiency.

quote.citation: The future of transcontinental investment belongs to those who know how to navigate between environments, create sustainable bridges between economies, while never losing sight of the human element.

items.title: Analytical Rigor
items.description: Every analysis is supported by field data and verified. Zero approximation in our deliverables.

items.title: Independence
items.description: We have no interests in the projects we support. Our only commitment: your success.

items.title: Total Discretion
items.description: Absolute confidentiality on your projects, partners and strategic data.

leftContent.preTitle: Transforming the complexity of international markets into

items.title: Project Structuring
items.body: Strategic framing, financial modeling, organizational structuring from the upstream phase. We support the implementation of complex projects ensuring a solid foundation for their development.

items.title: Feasibility Analysis
items.body: Market study, risk assessment and regulatory constraints before any commitment. Our expertise identifies opportunities and challenges to ensure project viability.

items.title: Institutional & Regulatory Relations
items.body: Public actor mapping, strategic files, administrative negotiations. We effectively navigate complex institutional environments to facilitate your projects.

items.title: Implementation Support
items.body: Field coordination, local-international interface through to operational. We ensure the link between local and international teams for successful execution.

items.title: Coordination Europe Africa North America Asia
items.body: Team alignment, standards translation, decision synchronization. We facilitate transcontinental collaboration ensuring smooth and effective communication.

items.title: Deep understanding of African environments
items.description: Field knowledge that goes beyond theoretical studies, based on real immersion in local economic, institutional and cultural dynamics.

items.title: European standards and process requirements
items.description: Methodological rigor, regulatory compliance and transparency guide each of our interventions, respecting international best practices.

items.title: Execution-oriented approach
items.description: We don't just produce recommendations. Every strategy is designed to be operational, deployable and measurable.

items.title: Agile and strategic structure
items.description: A streamlined steering core, supported by an international network of experts mobilized on demand. This organization ensures responsiveness, precision and proximity with our clients.

meta.title: General Terms of Sale
meta.description: General Terms of Sale of DEOYA CAPITAL.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.content: These General Terms of Sale (GTS) govern the consulting, structuring, coordination and matchmaking services provided by DEOYA CAPITAL. Any order implies full acceptance of these GTS.

sections.title: 2. Nature of services
sections.content: DEOYA CAPITAL acts as advisor and project coordinator with a best-efforts obligation, not an obligation of result. Services are precisely defined in a quote or contract.

sections.title: 3. Contract formation
sections.content: Each service is subject to a prior quote. The mission begins only after client signs the quote and pays the corresponding deposit. Quote signature implies acceptance of these terms.

sections.title: 4. Payment terms and late penalties
sections.content: A thirty percent (30%) deposit is required at quote signature. The balance is payable in installments on a monthly basis according to mission progress validated by DEOYA CAPITAL. Each installment results in an invoice issued by DEOYA CAPITAL, payable upon receipt. In case of non-payment of an installment, DEOYA CAPITAL reserves the right to suspend mission execution until regularization. In case of late payment, penalties will be due as a matter of right, without reminder, calculated based on the legal rate in effect. Pursuant to article L441-10 of the Commercial Code, a flat fee for recovery costs of forty (40) euros will also be due. When recovery costs incurred exceed this amount, additional compensation may be requested upon justification.

sections.title: 5. Liability
sections.content: DEOYA CAPITAL is bound by a best-efforts obligation. Its liability can only be engaged in case of proven fault in executing its obligations. The client remains solely responsible for decisions made based on recommendations formulated by DEOYA CAPITAL. In any event, DEOYA CAPITAL's liability, all damages combined, is limited to the amount of fees actually received for the concerned mission. DEOYA CAPITAL cannot be held liable for indirect damages, notably loss of turnover, loss of opportunity or commercial prejudice.

sections.title: 6. Expert intervention
sections.content: DEOYA CAPITAL may involve partner experts within missions. These interveners act under their own responsibility. DEOYA CAPITAL cannot be held liable for their actions, omissions or failings.

sections.title: 7. Confidentiality
sections.content: The parties undertake to keep strictly confidential all information exchanged within the framework of the mission. This obligation applies throughout the mission duration and for a period of five (5) years from its termination, regardless of cause.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual property
sections.content: Deliverables remain DEOYA CAPITAL property until full payment of services. After payment, the client benefits from a usage right strictly limited to internal needs. Any reproduction, dissemination or exploitation without prior written authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content: In case of early termination: Performed services remain due and payable - Amounts paid are not refundable. DEOYA CAPITAL reserves the right to suspend or terminate the mission in case of client default, notably in case of non-payment.

sections.title: 10. Force majeure
sections.content: DEOYA CAPITAL cannot be held liable in case of an unforeseeable, irresistible and external event preventing the execution of its obligations.

sections.title: 11. Governing law and disputes
sections.content: These terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, the parties undertake to seek an amicable solution. In absence of amicable agreement, the dispute will be submitted to competent French courts.

sections.title: 12. Force majeure
sections.content: DEOYA CAPITAL cannot be held responsible in case of an unforeseeable and independent event of its will preventing the execution of services.

sections.title: 12. Acceptance
sections.content: The client's signature of the quote implies full and complete acceptance of these General Terms of Sale.

sections.title: 13. Applicable law
points: These GTS are subject to French law.
Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of French courts.

footer.contact: For any question regarding these GTS, contact us at:

hero.title: Join the DEOYA CAPITAL journey.
hero.subtitle: A passionate team, ambitious projects - let's build the future of transcontinental investment together.

trustSection.label: Our philosophy
trustSection.title: A firm built on trust
trustSection.description1: DEOYA CAPITAL was born from one conviction: transcontinental investment projects deserve a partner that understands both African ground realities and European standards.
trustSection.description2: Our model is an agile strategic firm with a high-level core team backed by an international network of selected experts.
trustSection.description3: We act where complexity is highest: at the intersection of markets, institutions and regulations.
trustSection.videoFallbackText: Your browser does not support video playback.

notreVision.label: Our vision
notreVision.title: Redefining transcontinental investment advisory
notreVision.subtitle: We advocate an advisory approach that combines international expertise with deep local understanding. Each project is an opportunity to structure solid investments and create sustainable bridges between economies.

values.title: Operational excellence
values.description: We transform strategies into concrete actions with rigorous management and structured field follow-up.

values.title: Trust and transparency
values.description: We build lasting relationships based on excellence, ethics and clear communication at every step.

values.title: Sustainable impact
values.description: We aim for lasting value creation, benefiting our clients and the ecosystems in which we operate.

notreVision.quote: The future of transcontinental investment belongs to those who can navigate between worlds without ever losing sight of the human element.

architectureEtEquipe.subtitle: A structure designed for operational excellence.

points.title: Strategic core
points.description: DEOYA's central team manages each mission with excellence. Strategy is defined and controlled internally at every step.

points.title: Network of selected experts
points.description: Sectoral and geographical experts mobilized on a custom basis according to the specific needs of each mission: sector, country, execution phase.

points.title: Rigorous methodological framework
points.description: Each mission follows a structured protocol ensuring consistency, traceability and quality of deliverables.

points.title: Reporting and transparency
points.description: Regular and structured monitoring for decision-makers, ensuring visibility, clarity and total absence of opacity.

discussProject.title: Join the DEOYA CAPITAL adventure.
discussProject.subtitle: A passionate team, ambitious projects - let's build the future of transcontinental investment together.

hero.title: Structured expertise serving international investments
hero.description: DEOYA CAPITAL supports companies, investors and institutions in the design, analysis and implementation of international-scale investment projects. Our expertise covers all strategic, operational and institutional dimensions necessary for the success of complex projects.

enjeux: Access to licenses and operating frameworks
Structuring and coordination of public/private projects
Access to international financing (AFD, BEI, World Bank)
Management of relations with local authorities
Access to local and regional markets

expertises.title: project structuring
expertises.objectif: Structure solid, coherent and executable projects in complex environments
expertises.description: We support the design and organization of investment projects, from the strategic reflection phase to their operational implementation.

points.title: Strategic project structuring
points.description: Definition of positioning, objectives and development scenarios, in line with target market dynamics.

points.title: Economic modeling and development scenarios
points.description: Building economic models, analyzing assumptions and structuring growth trajectories.

points.title: Identification and structuring of partnerships
points.description: Selection of key actors (local, technical or financial partners) and organization of collaboration modalities.

points.title: Development of operational roadmaps
points.description: Definition of key steps, priorities and resources necessary for project deployment.

points.title: Investment strategy & development
points.description: Definition of market entry strategies, prioritization of opportunities and support for investment decisions.

expertises.title: feasibility analysis
expertises.objectif: Secure decisions and validate project relevance before commitment
expertises.description: We produce high-value-added strategic analyses to enlighten investment decisions and evaluate project relevance upstream.

points.title: Analysis of economic and sectoral environments
points.description: Study of market dynamics, sectoral opportunities and entry conditions.

points.title: Country analysis & economic intelligence
points.description: Analysis of political, economic and regulatory risks, understanding of local dynamics and mapping of key actors.

points.title: Assessment of regulatory and operational risks
points.description: Identification of legal, administrative and operational constraints likely to impact the project.

points.title: Feasibility studies and validation of assumptions
points.description: Analysis of the overall viability of the project in view of the market, resources and identified constraints.

points.title: Strategic monitoring & sectoral intelligence
points.description: Monitoring of regulatory and economic developments, sectoral analyses and identification of market trends.

expertises.title: institutional relations & regulatory environments
expertises.objectif: Secure institutional interactions and facilitate project implementation
expertises.description: We facilitate access to local ecosystems and support interactions with institutional actors. We operate at the interface of public actors, regulatory frameworks and institutional dynamics specific to each market.

points.title: Understanding institutional frameworks
points.description: Analysis of administrative structures, public actors and decision-making processes.

points.title: Market access & networking
points.description: Identification of relevant partners, qualified networking and support in local interactions.

points.title: Support in regulatory procedures
points.description: Support in understanding and structuring administrative and regulatory procedures.

points.title: Analysis of political and institutional dynamics
points.description: Reading of political environments and assessment of their impact on projects.

expertises.title: counter-expertise & independent validation
expertises.objectif: Identify risks, challenge existing analyses and strengthen the reliability of strategic decisions.
expertises.description: DEOYA CAPITAL intervenes in addition to existing devices to provide an independent reading, anchored in local and operational realities. We analyze, confront and validate strategic orientations in complex investment environments.

points.title: Strategic review of existing analyses
points.description: Critical analysis of reports, studies or recommendations already produced.

points.title: Field validation & local realities
points.description: Confrontation of assumptions with institutional, economic and operational realities.

points.title: Identification of underestimated risks
points.description: Detection of potential friction points (regulatory, political, partners, execution).

points.title: Analysis of actors & local dynamics
points.description: Fine reading of ecosystems: key actors, influences, power relations.

points.title: Adjusted recommendations
points.description: Proposal of concrete adjustments to secure and optimize the project.

hero.title: Partnerships
hero.subtitle: Bridging public interests and private investment for strategic projects.
introduction: Public-private partnerships are not just contractual arrangements.
They rely on sensitive balances between public interests, economic logic, and institutional constraints.
Their success depends less on technical approach than on the ability to understand and align stakeholders with sometimes divergent objectives.
highlight: : where public decision, investment logic, and ground reality meet.

items.title: Navigating between public and private spheres
items.intro: PPP projects involve a multiplicity of actors with their own logic:
items.outcomesLabel: We provide a clear reading of these interactions to:

items.title: Integrating local realities into international frameworks
items.intro: In many contexts, particularly in Africa, projects operate in hybrid environments:
actors: Gap between theoretical standards and operational realities
items.note: These elements are not anomalies - they are an integral part of the project.
items.outcomesLabel: Our role is to integrate them into strategic thinking, to avoid gaps between design and implementation.

items.title: A transcontinental reading of projects
items.intro: PPPs often involve actors from different economic zones. This diversity creates gaps:
items.outcomesLabel: We intervene in a transcontinental logic, providing a coherent reading of these differences and facilitating their articulation.

items.title: An approach anchored in project reality
items.intro: Beyond theoretical frameworks, projects evolve in concrete environments with their constraints and unforeseen events. We work alongside decision-makers to:
items.outcomesLabel: This proximity helps avoid breaks between strategy and reality.

discussProject.title: Go further
discussProject.subtitle: If you are developing a project involving public and private stakeholders, or wish to better understand the dynamics specific to public-private partnerships, we would be delighted to examine the terms of support adapted to your challenges.

secteurs.label: Our Sectors
secteurs.title: Multisector expertise for your ambitious projects.
secteurs.description: From heavy industry to digital technologies, we support transformation across strategic sectors.
secteurs.discussSubtitle: Every industry has its challenges. We provide adapted solutions.
secteurs.interventionDescription: Fine understanding of local challenges, mastery of international standards, and an immediately activatable network.
